title: One Player Sleep
description: This simple QOL datapack requires only 1 player to sleep for the world to progress to daytime.
body:
This simple QOL datapack requires only 1 player to sleep for the world to switch to daytime.
If you uninstall the pack the one player sleep will still be activated so you have to do:

```
/gamerule playersSleepingPercentage 100
```
and you must be an operator to do this command.

to fully remove the pack.

I am new to creating datapacks.

- Dank__Memer
